backend/main.mo: Main actor defining campers, messages, events, location events, user profiles, and access‑controlled methods with support for persisted notification preferences and migration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module converting old user profiles to new ones with default notification preferences while preserving existing maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of short summaries for all frontend files describing styling, hooks, components, and notification‑related updates.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React app shell that manages section navigation, wraps providers, mounts notification watcher, and renders the notification toaster.
UI component displaying campers with status badges, UTC‑safe date formatting, and delete functionality using a trash icon.
Manages creation, editing, and deletion of campfire events with date handling and user identity integration.
frontend/src/components/ChatSection.tsx: Displays real-time chat messages and allows campers to send messages using stored profile names.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a simple footer with copyright text and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Provides navigation buttons for switching between major app sections.
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: Renders the landing page with a hero banner and feature navigation cards.
frontend/src/components/LakeLocationSect: Handles creation, editing, and deletion of lake location events with location selection and profile-based validation.
frontend/src/components/NotificationSett: Renders a full notification settings UI allowing users to toggle triggers and adjust toast appearance, syncing changes with backend preferences.
frontend/src/components/NotificationToas: Loads user notification preferences and configures the Sonner toaster position accordingly.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSection.t: Manages camper profile editing, saving, and status updates, including date handling and integration with notification settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to the user’s identity and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication flow, storing identities, handling login state, and exposing login/clear methods via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotificationPrefer: Defines default notification preferences, normalizes backend values, and exports option lists and trigger metadata for the UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Implements a custom notification system respecting user preferences and watchers that trigger toasts on new messages or events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating camper data, messages, and related fields via the actor API, with cache invalidation.
Empty placeholder file for session validation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base and utility setup plus custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and global styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that initializes React, React Query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, custom colors via CSS variables, animations, plugins, and dark mode settings.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing features, requirements, architecture notes, and pending feature requests.
